name: BimaNiti
title: Insurance & Market Analysis
tagline: Analysing markets, decoding insurance, and sharing insights that matter.
bio: BimaNiti is a dedicated platform for insurance analytics, market research, and financial insights. With a deep understanding of the Indian insurance landscape, regulatory developments, and market dynamics, BimaNiti provides well-researched analysis on insurance trends, market movements, and investment opportunities.
shortBio: Insurance analysis platform tracking IRDAI regulatory developments, insurer performance, and market structure in India.

site.title: BimaNiti — Insurance & Market Insights
